bridge_equation_v30.plasticity_term: B_plastic_v30 = mix(B_plastic_v29, L_system_steady, 1 - P_system_steady, D_feature_v24, 1 - G_brain_v24)
bridge_equation_v30.structure_term: B_struct_v30 = mix(B_struct_v29, S_system_steady, R_system_steady, 1 - P_system_steady, D_structure_v24)
bridge_equation_v30.readiness_term: R_train_v30 = mix(R_train_v29, B_plastic_v30, B_struct_v30, R_system_steady, D_align_v24, 1 - P_system_steady)

project_readout.summary: 训练终式第三十桥开始吸收系统级稳态放大验证和脑编码第二十四版，检查系统级稳态承接是否继续压低规则层风险。
project_readout.next_question: 下一步要把第三十桥并回主核，验证系统级稳态放大是否继续走向更低风险施工区。
